name: BLEScope
subtitle: BLEScope official AltStore source.
description:
This is the official AltStore source for BLEScope.

Scan nearby BLE peripherals, inspect services and characteristics, read and write payloads, monitor notifications, and export debugging logs.

apps.name: BLEScope
apps.subtitle: SwiftUI BLE debugging tool for iPhone and iPad.
apps.localizedDescription: Scan nearby BLE peripherals, inspect services and characteristics, read and write payloads, monitor notifications, and export debugging logs.

privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Bluetooth access is required for BLE scanning, connecting, and debugging.
privacy.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Bluetooth access is required for BLE scanning, connecting, and debugging.
